steps.title: Identify the perimeter formula for a rectangle
steps.content: The perimeter of a rectangle is the sum of all four sides. Since opposite sides are equal, we use length and width to calculate it. We're given length = 13 and width = 6.

steps.title: Substitute the values and calculate
steps.content:
Substitute $l = 13$ and $w = 6$ into the formula:
$$P = 2(13) + 2(6)$$
$$P = 26 + 12$$
$$P = 38$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
